affine_history_field.decision_note: Exact finite spatial construction; B-source removal, balance, boundary trace, reconstruction, and complement exchange are tested.

kernel_fiber_integrability.decision_note: Typed balance map, swap involution, kernel/diagonal projectors, and balance-preserving update are implemented.

parity_to_bit_equivalence_and_2_adic_cod.decision_note: Exact finite-prefix parity schedule and explicit truncated 2-adic readout are implemented without claiming an infinite numerical object.

phase_clock.decision_note: Typed origin-free C2 phase and involutive shift are implemented.

phase_indexed_kernel_transport.decision_note: Potential-difference transport uses both complete sources and satisfies composition, inverse, balance, and two source-removal tests.

scheduled_spectral_history.decision_note: The encoder is a genuine schedule-plus-involution derivation with exact finite decoder and both-source ablations.

self_negating_oscillation_and_eigenstruc.decision_note: Canonical F(x)=-x source law, F^2=I, projectors, exact period-two orbit, harmonic sampling, and zero-state failure boundary are implemented.
